migrations.name: 001_initial_schema
migrations.description: Initial PokerTools PostgreSQL schema — mirrors the SQLite schema including User, Account, LedgerEntry, PaymentTransaction, Table, Tournament, TournamentEntry, HandHistory, Session, PlayerNote, AuditLog, IdempotencyRecord, Blockchain, Token, AdminWallet, UserWallet, DepositSession, and Tournament.lastBlindAdvancedAt.
